action.reasoning: Observation: best still 0.5889 (iter11 with replay+KD+consolidation). Latest runs (12-14) degraded to 0.46/0.46/0.13 due to truncated train.py (incomplete after dataset creation, no optimizer steps/KD/loss on later tasks, high loss~6, train acc~0.03). Curves show logging but no real learning post-task0. Analysis: code truncation from long file is root cause; prior good run had complete balanced mem (via meta+torch.where), full KD (KLDiv on softmax/T), per-epoch val/best tracking, consolidation. Val acc recovers only partially in consold. Decision: fully rewrite clean non-truncated train.py (mem=550/task balanced per-class, epochs/task=7, consold=4@lower lr, Adam(4e-4,wd=1e-5), KD beta=0.45 T=2.5, cosine scheduler reset per-task, dense logging every 20 steps with train_acc, val+best tracking per epoch, proper old_model deepcopy for KD, final best ckpt with 'model_state_dict'). Keep model.py/predict.py. This should recover >0.58 and push toward 0.61 with tuned params. Run training then submit_eval.
